verses.text: Kote pen Khrih' nasem, leh Pasian' thusim a zeekte-in nong ngaihsut ding uh ahi hi
Nasem i cih mite pen a topa uh tungah citakin a thuman ding uh kisam hi
Note na hi uh a, leitung mite in ahi zongin kei tungah mawhna hong zongin thu nong khen uh hangin bangmah phamawh ka sa kei hi. Keimahmah zong kimawhsakin thu ka kikhen kei hi
Ka kisuan'na ding thu bangmah ka thei het kei hi. Ahi zongin tua pen ka dik hi, cihna hi pah lo hi. Keima thu a hong khen dingpa pen Topa ahi hi

Tua ahih manin a hun a tun'ma-in kuamah mawhsakin thu khen kei un. Topa hong pai ciangin a tawpna thukhenna hong om ding a, amah in thusimte hong pholakin, mihingte in a lungsim sung uhah a ipcip uh thute hong telkheh ding hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in amau' ngahdingin a kilawm phatna, Pasian' kiang panin a ngah ciat ding uh hi

Sanggamte aw, note-a' ding ka ngaihsutna-in hih thu khempeuh Apollos leh keima pumpi tungah ka zat uh thu ahi hi. “A khengvalin gamta kei un,” cihna thu na theihna dingun kote gel, etteh dingin ka hong zang hi. Note in mi khatpeuh kisaktheihpihin mi khatpeuh na simmawhbawl kei ding uh hi
Note in bang kisaktheihpih na hi uh hiam? Tu-a na neih khempeuh uh Pasian' hong piak hilo ahi hiam? Tua ahih leh hong kipiasa bek ahih manin a bang kisaktheihpih na hi uh hiam

Na deih khempeuh uh neikhin na kisa uh a, haukhin na kisa uh hi. Kote' omloh kalin kumpi a suak khinin na kingaihsun uh hi. Note tawh kumpi hikhawm ding ihih manin kumpi taktak a suak takpi na hi le uh cin ka ut mahmah hi
Ko sawltakte pen vantung mi leh leitung mi khempeuh in a et dingin mipi' mai-ah thahna a thuakdingin thukhenna a kipia mi bangin Pasian in a zaneu penin hong koih tawntung tawh kibang ka sa hi

Khrih hangin mite mai-ah kote mihai ka suak uh a, ahi zongin note pen Khrih sungah mipil na kisa uh hi. Kote ka thaneem uh a, ahi zongin note a hat na kisa uh hi. Kote hong kisimmawhbawl a, ahi zongin note hong kizahtakbawl na kisa uh hi
Tuni ciangdong gilkial dangtakin puansilh ding nangawn neiloin ka om uh hi. Inn leh lo zong neiloin hong kinotsuk hong kinotto kawikawi hi
Kote' nektawm ding ka thatang mahmah uh tawh nakpi takin ka sem uh hi. Hong kisamsiat ciangin thupha ka lehpiak uh a, hong kibawlsiat ciangin ka gumthuak uh hi
Zahpihna kam tawh hong kihopih ciangin kamkhum tawh ka dawng uh hi. Mite' muhna-ah tuni ciangdong ninbulom leh leivuithem bang bek ka hi uh hi
Hih bangin lai ka hong gelh ciangin na maizumna ding uh ka deihna hilo a, ta itte thuhilh bangin a hong thuhilh ka hi hi

Khrih thu hong hilh ding mi a tul a za-in na nei uh ahi zongin pa-a na neihding uh kei bek a om ka hihna thu na phawk un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah lungdamna thu ka hong hilhna hangin Jesuh Khrih sungah nomau' pa ka suak hi
Tua ahih manin keima gamtatzia na hong zuihna dingun ka hong thum hi

Tua thu hangin note kiangah, ka it mahmah, Topa thu sungah a citak mahmah, ka tapa Timoti ka hong paisak hi. Amah in, Jesuh Khrih thu sungah ka nuntakna ziate leh pawlpi a tuamtuamte kiangah ka thuhilhte khempeuh, note tungah hong hilh ding hi
Note kiangah kei hong hawhlo ding, ci-in ngaihsunkha uh ahih manin mi pawlkhat a kiphasak uh hi
Ahi zongin Topa in hong thukimpih nak leh kei ka hong hawhbaih ding a, tua a kiphatsak pau mawkmawkte in bang ciang taktak a hihzo ngap uh hiam, cih thu keima pumpi tawh ka mu ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian' Ukna thu i cih pen kampi bek tawh genna hilo a, Pasian' vang tawh nungta-in gamtatna ahi hi
Tua ahih manin note taii-in gim a hong pia dingin ka hong pai ding leh itna leh lungnemna lungsim tawh ka hong pai ding koi deihzaw na hi uh hiam?
